header_0.cue: A coworker takes credit for your idea
header_0.raw_response: In this situation, I would place the marker closer to the 'Let it go' side, around 30. While I don't like the idea of someone taking credit for my work, I also value maintaining a peaceful work environment. I believe that addressing the issue directly could potentially cause more tension, especially if the coworker denies it or if the situation escalates. Instead, I would try to handle it indirectly by subtly reminding the coworker of my contribution or by discussing it with a trusted colleague. I would only consider a direct confrontation if the behavior continues or if it significantly impacts my work.
